headline: Exelon CEO says AI data centers nearly caused blackouts for 400,000 customers — and electric bills are going up next
summary: Calvin Butler, CEO of Exelon, says AI data centers are pushing the country's power grid to its limits — and warns that consumers should brace for both rising bills and the growing risk of blackouts.

content.title: Exelon CEO says AI data centers nearly caused blackouts for 400,000 customers — and electric bills are going up next
content.summary: Calvin Butler, CEO of Exelon, says AI data centers are pushing the country's power grid to its limits — and warns that consumers should brace for both rising bills and the growing risk of blackouts.

headline: ComEd Programs Help Hundreds of Thousands of Northern Illinois Small Businesses Cut Costs and Save Energy
summary: ELMHURST, Ill., July 14, 2026--As small-business owners face rising operating costs, ComEd is marking a major milestone: more than 100,000 small businesses across northern Illinois have completed free facility assessments. Energy-saving improvements made through these assessments have helped participating businesses save $262.8 million annually on energy costs, supported by $607 million in incentives to offset the cost of upgrades.

content.title: ComEd Programs Help Hundreds of Thousands of Northern Illinois Small Businesses Cut Costs and Save Energy
